## Safety constraints

- [ ] No approval, guarantee, final eligibility, underwriting-decision, best-rate, instant-approval, or credit-repair claims.
- [ ] No real provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, commissions, private contacts, private notes, routing secrets, credentials, or real borrower PII.
- [ ] No `vercel.json` change unless separately authorized.
